Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Users Request Input A DECLARE process model represented as a Python dictionary Context Loan application review process Problem Potential bias based on sensitive attributes Age Gender Race Task Add new DECLARE constraints to mitigate bias

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Given Model Activities present StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo I need to introduce new activities related to sensitive attributes and fairness checks eg CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Potential Bias the process might be susceptible to bias against certain applicants based on sensitive attributes For instance a FinalDecision of Reject might occur more frequently after seeing attributes like ApplicantRace Minority without a proper check in between

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Determine New Activities Constraints Lets define the new activities needed Sensitive attribute checks CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge Fairness checks BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Decisions Approve Reject Lets design specific constraints a Coexistence If CheckApplicantRace occurs ManualReview must also occur b Nonsuccession Prevent direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject c Response Precedence BiasMitigationCheck must precede FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Verify DECLARE constraint meanings existence A must occur at least once coexistence If A occurs B must also occur response If A occurs B must occur later precedence If B occurs A must have occurred earlier nonsuccession If A occurs B cannot immediately follow A

Name: Validation - PE
Text: My additions align well with these definitions Check format For binary constraints map an activity to another activitys dictionary setting support 10 confidence 10 My dictionary matches this exactly

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrection Refinement during thought I should verify that I didnt accidentally modify existing constraints Adjust coexistence to match the prompts exact example Reject ManualReview Adjust nonsuccession to match CheckApplicantRace Reject Final check of the dictionary structure

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets construct the final dictionary carefully preserving all original keys and values and inserting the new ones Ill make sure the Python code is valid and properly indented
